search_document:
User Request: Products by supplier.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Products by Supplier
Type: bar_chart
Description: Distribution of products across different suppliers
Title: Top Suppliers
Type: table
Description: Suppliers with the highest number of products
Title: Total Products
Type: kpi
Description: Overall count of products available

sql_queries.title: Products by Supplier
sql_queries.description: Distribution of products across different suppliers
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, COUNT(p.ProductID) AS ProductCount FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID GROUP BY s.CompanyName ORDER BY ProductCount DESC

sql_queries.title: Top Suppliers
sql_queries.description: Suppliers with the highest number of products
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, COUNT(p.ProductID) AS ProductCount FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID GROUP BY s.CompanyName ORDER BY ProductCount DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Products
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(ProductID) AS TotalProducts FROM Products
